capabilities.name: Search
capabilities.notes: Skill surface BUILT 2026-07-05 (was the gap): search_kb skill (module:kb, action=search) matches title/question/answer server-side with the same reach as the public KnowledgeBasePage search box — published-only by default, featured-then-views ranking; new 'search' action in the KB handler in agent-execute. DEPLOY STATUS 2026-07-05 evening: agent-execute redeployed (the search action IS live in the handler), but Lovable hand-seeded the search_kb agent_skills row with the WRONG handler — a live gateway call reached agent-execute and came back with the recursive 400 body {'error':'skill_id or skill_name required'}, the signature of an edge:agent-execute-style handler re-invoking agent-execute without skill_name, instead of handler module:kb (the seeded description 'Search KB articles by keyword.' also doesn't match the repo seed, confirming hand-seeding). Fix: re-run 'Sync skills from code' in /admin/modules (bootstrap UPDATEs handler/description/tool_definition from the bundled kb-module seeds) or UPDATE agent_skills SET handler='module:kb' WHERE name='search_kb'. Stays partial pending that + a Stage-3 live search returning results. Public UI search remains client-side substring (server FTS is the remaining depth item).
